recap:
- AI agents are autonomous systems that integrate perception, decision-making, and action to address complex challenges.
- The evolution of AI agents has progressed from basic rule-based models to advanced, tool-enabled systems.
- Agent tools enhance AI functionality by connecting to external systems, data sources, and offering specialized capabilities.
- Unity Catalog serves as the governance and management framework essential for deploying agent tools in an enterprise environment.
- Understanding the role of tools is crucial for comprehending agentic behavior in AI systems.
